title: Iran Statistical Yearbook 1399 (2020/21) — selected English chapters (Price Indices/CPI, National Accounts, HEIS, Manpower, Government Budget) retrieved via Wayback Machine
source_org: Statistical Centre of Iran (SCI / Markaz-e Amar-e Iran)
time_coverage: Iranian fiscal year 1399 (2020/21), most tables with multi-year time series back to earlier years
units: described within each chapter PDF (rial, index points, persons, etc.)
license_terms: SCI public publication; no explicit license stated on site
notes: Direct TLS connection to amar.org.ir/www.amar.org.ir resets (curl error 35, 'Recv failure: Connection reset by peer' at TLS Client Hello stage) — consistent with known intermittent geo-blocking of Iranian gov sites noted in SOURCES.md, not a JS bot-challenge like cbi.ir. Retrieved via Wayback Machine CDX API instead: found the archived English 'Yearbooks and similar compendia' landing page, followed to the Statistical Yearbook 2020-2021 (Persian year 1399) English edition landing page (web.archive.org snapshot 20240214151107), which listed 22 of 25 chapter PDFs at /Portals/1/yearbook/1399/{N}.pdf with English chapter titles (full list found: 1 Land & Climate, 2 Environment, 3 Population, 4 Manpower, 5 Agriculture/Forestry/Fisheries, 6 Mining & Quarrying, 7 Oil & Gas, 9 Water & Electricity, 10 Construction & Housing, 11 Trade & Hotels, 12 Transport & Storage, 13 Communications, 14 Financial Intermediation, 15 Judicial Affairs, 16 Welfare & Social Security, 17 Education, 18 Health & Treatment, 19 Culture & Tourism, 20 Government Budget, 21 Household Expenditure & Income, 22 Price Indices, 23 National Accounts, 24 International Statistics, 25 Political Affairs; chapters 8 and 00/99 also exist as front/back matter). Confirmed via CDX that all chapter PDFs are individually archived (application/pdf, HTTP 200, snapshot batch 2023-03-29). Downloaded the 6 most directly economics-relevant chapters (CPI/Price Indices was explicitly requested by task; added National Accounts, Household Expenditure & Income, Manpower/Labor, Government Budget, and the Preliminary Pages/TOC for reference). Did not download the remaining ~16 chapters (land/climate, environment, population, mining, oil&gas, water, construction, trade, transport, communications, banking, judicial, welfare, education, health, culture, international stats, political affairs) to stay within task scope — their Wayback URLs and timestamps are recoverable from the same CDX prefix query (amar.org.ir/Portals/1/yearbook/1399/) if needed later. Did not separately fetch a standalone 'English CPI page' (Statistics-by-Topic/Economic-statistics/Prices) — no Wayback snapshot found for that exact path via CDX; the Price Indices yearbook chapter (ch22) serves the same CPI content in tabular form and was prioritized instead.

failures.reason: TLS connection reset (curl 35) at Client Hello — geo-block/network-level, not a bot challenge
no Wayback CDX snapshot found for this exact path
no Wayback CDX snapshot found (yearbook-by-year landing pages under /en/ not archived)
